steps.title: Intake and inventory
steps.why: A machine that is not in inventory does not exist when it goes missing.
steps.done_when: Asset tag issued; it becomes the hostname.
steps.record: Device in inventory with tag, serial, model.

subtasks.title: Roles/services installed and documented
subtasks.record: What this server DOES is written on its device record  -  the next admin should not have to guess.

steps.title: Service accounts into the registry
steps.why: A server born with undocumented admin credentials is a future breach with a hostname.
steps.instructions: Every admin/service credential this server runs on enters the registry as a SERVICE account (held by nobody  -  it runs the system).
steps.done_when: Each credential resolves in the registry; none exist only in someone's head.
steps.record: Service accounts linked to this device.

subtasks.title: Monitoring agent reporting
subtasks.done_when: Server visible in the monitoring console with alerts armed.

subtasks.title: Backup agent + first successful backup
subtasks.done_when: A restore test of one file succeeds  -  a backup that never restored is a hope, not a backup.

steps.title: QA before it enters the ready pool
steps.why: The pool only works if "ready" means ready  -  onboarding trusts it blindly.
steps.instructions: Test login, network, printers, peripherals. For servers: confirm services survive a reboot.
steps.done_when: A test user session works end to end.
steps.record: Device marked READY in inventory  -  it can now be assigned by onboarding.
